armyRules.name: Canoptek
armyRules.shortDesc: This model is a Canoptek construct.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model is a Canoptek construct and follows all Canoptek rules.

armyRules.name: Hardwired for Destruction
armyRules.shortDesc: +1 To Hit in close combat.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model gets +1 To Hit in close combat.

armyRules.name: Living Metal
armyRules.shortDesc: Regenerate 1 Wound each Command Phase.
armyRules.fullDesc: At the start of each Command Phase, this model recovers 1 lost Wound.

armyRules.name: Quantum Shielding
armyRules.shortDesc: Ignore glancing hits; 5+ to ignore penetrating hits.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model ignores Glancing Hits. On a 5+, it also ignores Penetrating Hits.

armyRules.name: Reanimation
armyRules.shortDesc: Roll to stand back up when slain on a 4+.
armyRules.fullDesc: When this model is slain, roll a d6 at the end of the phase. On a 4+, it is restored to 1 Wound remaining.

armyRules.name: Soulless Machines
armyRules.shortDesc: Immune to Fear, Pinning, and Morale effects.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model is immune to Fear, Pinning, and all Morale tests.

armyRules.name: My Will Be Done
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: Necron Infantry gain +1 To Hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly Necron Infantry units gain +1 To Hit on all attacks.

armyRules.name: Relentless March
armyRules.shortDesc: May move and shoot Heavy weapons without penalty.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model or unit may fire Heavy weapons even after moving without any penalty.

armyRules.name: Improved Living Metal
armyRules.shortDesc: Regenerate d3 Wounds each Command Phase.
armyRules.fullDesc: At the start of each Command Phase, this model recovers d3 lost Wounds instead of 1.

armyRules.name: United in Destruction
armyRules.shortDesc: Within 6" of another Necron unit, re-roll 1s to hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: Friendly Necron units within 6" of at least one other friendly Necron unit may re-roll rolls of 1 to hit.

armyRules.name: Vanquish the Living
armyRules.shortDesc: Re-roll failed to wound rolls vs non-vehicle, non-monster targets.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may re-roll all failed to wound rolls against units that are neither Vehicles nor Monsters.

armyRules.name: Their Number is Legion
armyRules.shortDesc: This unit may exceed its normal maximum squad size by 5 models.
armyRules.fullDesc: This unit may purchase up to 5 additional models beyond its listed maximum.

armyRules.name: Agents of the Silent King
armyRules.shortDesc: Any Dynasty may take this unit.
armyRules.fullDesc: This unit is not bound to any Dynasty and may be taken in any Necron army regardless of Dynasty choice.

armyRules.name: Targeting Relay
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: friendly Necron units re-roll 1s to hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly Necron units within range may re-roll rolls of 1 on all To Hit rolls.

armyRules.name: War Construct
armyRules.shortDesc: +1 Attack for each enemy model in base contact beyond the first.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model gains +1 Attack in melee for each enemy model in base contact beyond the first.

armyRules.name: Never Stop Firing
armyRules.shortDesc: May fire all ranged weapons even after advancing or falling back.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may fire all of its ranged weapons in the Shooting Phase even if it Advanced or Fell Back this turn.

armyRules.name: Clog the Barrels
armyRules.shortDesc: Each model in base contact with an enemy vehicle: that vehicle loses 1 BS.
armyRules.fullDesc: For each model in this unit that is in base contact with an enemy vehicle, that vehicle suffers -1 to its BS.

armyRules.name: Wrath Form
armyRules.shortDesc: Re-roll charge distance; +1 Attack on the turn this model charges.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may re-roll its charge distance. In addition, it gains +1 Attack on any turn in which it successfully charges.

armyRules.name: Phase Generator
armyRules.shortDesc: 3+ invulnerable save.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 3+ invulnerable save against all attacks.

armyRules.name: Immune to Natural Law
armyRules.shortDesc: Ignores all terrain movement penalties.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may move through all terrain without penalty and never takes Dangerous Terrain tests.

armyRules.name: Massive Battery Unit
armyRules.shortDesc: All friendly Tesla weapons within 12" re-roll hits of 1.
armyRules.fullDesc: All friendly Tesla weapons within 12" of this model may re-roll rolls of 1 to hit.

armyRules.name: Particle Focus
armyRules.shortDesc: All friendly Gauss weapons within 6" gain +1 Strength.
armyRules.fullDesc: All friendly Gauss weapons within 6" of this model gain +1 Strength.

armyRules.name: Eternity Portal
armyRules.shortDesc: Units may embark/disembark through Eternity Portal gates.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has an Eternity Portal that allows friendly Necron units to embark or disembark as if it were a transport, using the Monolith Vault rules.

armyRules.name: Monster Escort
armyRules.shortDesc: Must deploy within 6" of a Cryptek or Overlord character.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model must be deployed within 6" of a friendly Cryptek or Overlord independent character. It may not move further than 12" from them during play.

armyRules.name: Reanimation Beam
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: friendly Necron infantry auto-pass Reanimation rolls.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly Necron Infantry within range automatically pass their Reanimation Protocol rolls.

armyRules.name: Repair Barge
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: target unit gains +1 to Reanimation rolls (max 4+).
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly units within range gain +1 to their Reanimation Protocol rolls. This cannot improve rolls beyond a 4+.

armyRules.name: Nanoscarabs
armyRules.shortDesc: Repair a vehicle or Heal a model within 3".
armyRules.fullDesc: In the Command Phase, this model may attempt to Repair a friendly Vehicle or Heal a friendly model within 3", restoring d3 Wounds.

armyRules.name: Harbringer of Destruction
armyRules.shortDesc: 8" Aura: Friendly Necron ranged attacks gain +1 To Hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: 8" Aura: Friendly Necron units within range gain +1 To Hit on ranged attacks.

armyRules.name: Living Lightning
armyRules.shortDesc: On a 6 To Hit ranged, make one additional hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: Each time this model rolls a 6 or more To Hit with a ranged attack, it immediately makes one additional hit against the same target.

armyRules.name: Harbringer of Doom
armyRules.shortDesc: 12" Aura: enemy units suffer -1 Leadership.
armyRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura: Enemy units within range suffer -1 to their Leadership characteristic.

armyRules.name: Psychokinesis
armyRules.shortDesc: Once per turn, move one enemy model d6" in any direction.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per turn, before the enemy movement phase, nominate one enemy model within 18". Move it d6" in any direction, ignoring terrain.

armyRules.name: Dread
armyRules.shortDesc: 12" Aura: enemy units must pass Fear test or suffer -1 To Hit.
armyRules.fullDesc: 12" Aura: Enemy units within range must pass a Fear test at the start of each phase. On a failure, they suffer -1 To Hit until the end of that phase.

armyRules.name: Gaze of Death
armyRules.shortDesc: Shooting attack: target must pass Ld test or suffer d3 mortal wounds.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per Shooting Phase, this model may make a Gaze of Death attack against a single enemy model within 12". The target must pass a Leadership test or suffer d3 mortal wounds.

armyRules.name: Matter Absorption
armyRules.shortDesc: When this model destroys a model in melee, regain d3 Wounds.
armyRules.fullDesc: Each time this model destroys an enemy model in close combat, it regains d3 lost Wounds, up to its starting total.

armyRules.name: Translocation Protocols
armyRules.shortDesc: Once per game, teleport up to 18" as if Deepstriking.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per game, in the Movement Phase, this model may remove itself from the battlefield and redeploy anywhere within 18", following Deepstrike rules.

armyRules.name: Resurrection Amplifier
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: friendly Necron Reanimation rolls succeed on a 3+.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly Necron units within range may make their Reanimation Protocol rolls on a 3+ instead of the normal value.

armyRules.name: Ziggurat Dock
armyRules.shortDesc: A Lord of War may enter the Ziggurat for repair and buffing.
armyRules.fullDesc: A single friendly Lord of War may enter this Fortification. While inside it regenerates d6 Wounds each Command Phase and gains +1 to all To Hit rolls.

armyRules.name: Monolith Vault
armyRules.shortDesc: May transport Lord of War units via Eternity Portal.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model's Eternity Portal may be used by Lord of War units. Up to one Lord of War may embark in addition to normal infantry capacity.

armyRules.name: Gates of the Tomb World
armyRules.shortDesc: Embarked units may disembark anywhere within 6", even if this model moved.
armyRules.fullDesc: Units embarking through this model's Eternity Portal may disembark anywhere within 6" of this model, regardless of whether it moved this turn.

armyRules.name: Doomsday Weapon
armyRules.shortDesc: Primary weapon is Ordnance; gains +2 Strength when not moving.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model's primary weapon has the Ordnance rule. In any turn this model did not move, its primary weapon gains +2 Strength.

armyRules.name: Invasion Beam
armyRules.shortDesc: Embarked units may disembark anywhere in the movement phase, counting as Deepstruck.
armyRules.fullDesc: Units may disembark from this model at any point during the Movement Phase. They count as having arrived via Deepstrike and may not charge on that turn.

armyRules.name: Grand Illusion
armyRules.shortDesc: Once per game, redeploy up to three friendly Necron units before the game.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per game, immediately before the first turn, this model may select up to three friendly Necron units and redeploy them anywhere in its own deployment zone.

armyRules.name: Empyric Overcharge
armyRules.shortDesc: Enemy psykers within 12" suffer -1 to all psychic rolls.
armyRules.fullDesc: Enemy psykers within 12" of this unit suffer -1 to all Psychic tests and Deny the Witch rolls.

armyRules.name: The Stars Are Right
armyRules.shortDesc: This unit may re-roll reserve rolls.
armyRules.fullDesc: This unit may re-roll any reserve rolls made to bring it onto the battlefield.

armyRules.name: Surrogate Hosts
armyRules.shortDesc: Once per phase, ignore one wound on a 4+.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per phase, when this model suffers a wound, it may roll a d6. On a 4+, the wound is ignored.

armyRules.name: Mechanical Augmentation
armyRules.shortDesc: May purchase one additional equipment upgrade.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model may take one additional Equipment upgrade from the named upgrade list beyond the normal allowance.

armyRules.name: Lord of Technology
armyRules.shortDesc: Repair: heal d3 Wounds on a target vehicle or model within 3".
armyRules.fullDesc: In the Command Phase, this model may Repair a friendly Vehicle or model within 3", healing d3 Wounds.

armyRules.name: Lord of the Pryhian Legions
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: friendly Necron Warriors gain +1 Attack.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly Necron Warrior units within range gain +1 Attack in close combat.

armyRules.name: Mind in the Machine
armyRules.shortDesc: Counts as Independent Character for Canoptek constructs.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model provides Independent Character benefits to Canoptek units and may join them as normal.

armyRules.name: Counter Tactics
armyRules.shortDesc: Once per game, interrupt enemy movement to shoot at them.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per game, when an enemy unit moves within 12" of this model, this model may immediately make a Snap Shot at that unit as an interrupt action.

armyRules.name: Adaptive Strategy
armyRules.shortDesc: Once per game, change this model's Warlord Trait.
armyRules.fullDesc: Once per game, in the Command Phase, this model may swap its current Warlord Trait for any other trait on the table.

armyRules.name: Ghostwalk Mantle
armyRules.shortDesc: 4+ invulnerable save.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save against all attacks.

armyRules.name: Cleaving Counterblow
armyRules.shortDesc: When reduced to 0 Wounds, make one free attack before removal.
armyRules.fullDesc: When this model is reduced to 0 Wounds, it may make one additional attack at its full profile before being removed from play.

armyRules.name: Writhing Bodies
armyRules.shortDesc: May move through units and terrain freely.
armyRules.fullDesc: This unit may move through friendly and enemy units, as well as all terrain features, without penalty or restriction during its movement phase.

armyRules.name: Death
armyRules.shortDesc: Enemy units within 6" suffer -1 Ld per casualty from that unit this turn.
armyRules.fullDesc: Enemy units within 6" of this model suffer -1 Leadership for each model removed as a casualty from that unit this turn.

armyRules.name: Phase Shift Generator
armyRules.shortDesc: 6" Aura: friendly Necron units gain a 4+ invulnerable save.
armyRules.fullDesc: 6" Aura: Friendly Necron units within range gain a 4+ invulnerable save.

armyRules.name: Prescient Strike
armyRules.shortDesc: Always acts first in Initiative order.
armyRules.fullDesc: This model always strikes first in the Initiative order, regardless of its actual Initiative value or any modifiers.

commonWargear.name: 2 Linked Synaptic Obliterators and Transdimensional Projectors
C'Tan Power: Sky of Falling Stars
Charged C'Tan Power: Sky of Falling Stars

mindshackle-scarabs.label: Mindshackle Scarabs
grantsRules: Mindshackle Scarabs — At the start of the Assault Phase, choose one enemy model in base contact. It must pass a Leadership test or fight itself this turn (its controller directs its attacks against its own unit).

phase-shifter.label: Phase Shifter
grantsRules: Phase Shifter — This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

resurrection-orb.label: Resurrection Orb
grantsRules: Resurrection Orb — Once per game, in the Command Phase, all friendly Necron models within 6" may immediately make a Reanimation roll, in addition to the normal roll.

canoptek-plasmacyte.label: Canoptek Plasmacyte
grantsRules: Canoptek Plasmacyte — Once per game, in the Command Phase, this unit may activate the Plasmacyte. All models in this unit gain +1 Attack until the end of the turn.

choices.label: Countertemporal Nanomines
grantsRules: Countertemporal Nanomines — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

choices.label: Cryptogeometric Adjuster
grantsRules: Cryptogeometric Adjuster — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

choices.label: Dimensional Sanctum
grantsRules: Dimensional Sanctum — This model and its unit gain Deepstrike.

choices.label: Hyper Material Ablator
grantsRules: Hyper Material Ablator — 6" Aura, target unit gains a 5+ Cover Save.

choices.label: Photonic Transubjector
grantsRules: Photonic Transubjector — This model ignores the First Wound Suffered per Phase.

choices.label: Prismatic Obfuscatron
grantsRules: Prismatic Obfuscatron — 6" Aura, this model and target unit may only be targeted if they are the closest unit to the attacker.

grantsRules: Countertemporal Nanomines — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

grantsRules: Photonic Transubjector — This model ignores the First Wound Suffered per Phase.

grantsRules: Prismatic Obfuscatron — 6" Aura, this model and target unit may only be targeted if they are the closest unit to the attacker.

grantsRules: Countertemporal Nanomines — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

grantsRules: Cryptogeometric Adjuster — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

grantsRules: Dimensional Sanctum — This model and its unit gain Deepstrike.

grantsRules: Hyper Material Ablator — 6" Aura, target unit gains a 5+ Cover Save.

grantsRules: Photonic Transubjector — This model ignores the First Wound Suffered per Phase.

choices.label: Prismatic Obfuscatron
grantsRules: Prismatic Obfuscatron — 6" Aura, this model and target unit may only be targeted if they are the closest unit to the attacker.

choices.label: Canoptek Cloak
grantsRules: Canoptek Cloak — M+6 and Fly.

choices.label: Canoptek Control Node
grantsRules: Canoptek Control Node — 6" Aura, target Canoptek Unit gains +1 To Hit.

choices.label: Countertemporal Nanomines
grantsRules: Countertemporal Nanomines — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

choices.label: Cryptogeometric Adjuster
grantsRules: Cryptogeometric Adjuster — 18" Aura, target unit only charges and advances at half speed.

inlineRules.name: Flayer Virus
inlineRules.shortDesc: 12" True Aura: all units suffer Ld-1; Necron units suffer Ld-2. Flayed Ones immune.
inlineRules.fullDesc: 12" True Aura, all units suffer Ld-1. Necron units suffer Ld-2 instead. Flayed Ones are Immune to this Aura.

options.label: Each Spyder may take (one of each)

choices.label: Repair Drones
grantsRules: Repair Drones — Repair 1 Wound on Target unit within 3". On a 5+, repair one Disabled Weapon, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed result.

choices.label: Fabricator Array
grantsRules: Fabricator Array — Repair d3 Wounds to target Vehicle within 3".

choices.label: Repair Barge
grantsRules: Repair Barge — 6" Aura, target unit gains +1 to Reanimation Rolls. Cannot be improved to better than 4+.

choices.label: Scarab Hive
grantsRules: Scarab Hive — In your Command Phase, add one Scarab Swarm to an existing Scarab unit within 6". May not exceed max unit size. Same unit not affected more than once per Turn.

choices.label: Gloom Prison
grantsRules: Gloom Prison — same effect as Gloom Prism.

choices.label: Gloom Prison
grantsRules: Gloom Prison — see Gloom Prism.

choices.label: Sepulchral Scarabs
grantsRules: Sepulchral Scarabs — Each Command Phase roll d6; on a 5+, Heal one additional Wound.

choices.label: Nebuloscope
grantsRules: Nebuloscope — Ranged attacks from this model inflict a -1 Cover Save.

choices.label: Shadowloom
grantsRules: Shadowloom — Shroud

choices.label: Shield Vanes
grantsRules: Shield Vanes — This model has Sv3+.

choices.label: Gloom Prison
